untranslatable_reason: Cross-sectional mean reversion requires comparison of individual stock returns against sector/market mean (unavailable in single-stock indicators). Lookback_period, threshold, and half_life parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT are essential but not provided. Cannot construct precise cross-sectional deviation detection using only single-instrument price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using intraday returns reversal as approximation of mean reversion (negative returns trigger long, positive trigger short). Actual implementation requires: (1) cross-sectional universe aggregation, (2) dynamic mean calculation across S&P 500 constituents, (3) z-score or deviation metrics. Backtest Sharpe of 4.7 suggests strong signal quality but requires author-specified parameters to validate.
